'''√v-r-b''' ('''kavarab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cutesify|cutesify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-r-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cutesify|cutesify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √v-r-b
|-
! Lemma
| kavarab
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thivarab || jivarab || shivarab || kivarab
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthuvarab || jujuvarab || shushuvarab || kukuvarab
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thuvarab || juvarab || shuvarab || kuvarab
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thuvarab || juvarab || shuvarab || kuvarab
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thevarab || jevarab || shevarab || kevarab
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothovarab || jojovarab || shoshovarab || kokovarab
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thovarab || jovarab || shovarab || kovarab
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thovarab || jovarab || shovarab || kovarab
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || varab || varab || varab || varab
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || varab || varab || varab || varab
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || varab || varab || varab || varab
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || varab || varab || varab || varab
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thævarab || jævarab || shævarab || kævarab
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathavarab || jajavarab || shashavarab || kakavarab
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thavarab || javarab || shavarab || kavarab
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thavarab || javarab || shavarab || kavarab
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shavarab
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshavarab
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishavarab
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shavarabnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshavarabnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishavarabnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shavarabshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshavarabnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishavarabshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shavarabro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshavarabnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishavarabro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shavarabmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshavarabnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishavarabmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shavarabsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshavarabnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishavarabsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shavarabng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshavarabnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishavarabng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shavarabya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshavarabnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishavarabya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shavarabyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshavarabnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishavarabyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shavarabnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshavarabnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishavarabnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shavarabnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshavarabnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishavarabnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shavarabnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshavarabnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishavarabnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shavarabshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshavarabnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishavarabshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shavarabshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshavarabnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishavarabshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shavarabshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshavarabnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishavarabshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shavarabronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshavarabnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishavarabronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shavarabroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshavarabnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishavarabroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shavarabromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshavarabnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishavarabromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shavarabmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshavarabnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishavarabmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shavarabmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshavarabnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishavarabmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shavarabmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshavarabnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishavarabmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
